claims.claim: Golden v0.1 randomized economic schedules supplied broad terminal or transition coverage.
claims.evidence: All one million recorded schedules terminated ROUTED.

claims.claim: Checked cube compression converts only the original twelve one-atom pathologies.
claims.evidence: The harder 240-case suite has zero unsafe regions and converts every AST-bound structured case to COMPILED or PARTIAL.

claims.claim: Current verification workloads justify a semantic-provenance DAG runtime.
claims.evidence: Only one of 704 input hashes repeats; structural reuse is 0.14 percent.

claims.claim: Reviewer-originated blindness and clean-room parity are established.
claims.evidence: No external cases, keys, submissions, ratings, or reveal have been received.

claims.claim: The declared portability matrix is fully observed.
claims.evidence: Two cells are observed and thirteen remain blocked; the local OCI build lacks a running Docker daemon.
